channel.title: Aura Alpha Blog
channel.description: Algorithmic trading insights, strategy analysis, and platform updates from Aura Alpha.

item.title: How We Built 83 Backtested Trading Strategies
item.description: A deep dive into the methodology behind Aura Alpha's 83 algorithmic trading strategies — from signal generation and backtesting across 1,132 symbols to walk-forward validation and the risk controls that keep them robust.
item.author: shawn@auraalpha.cc (Shawn Gallup)

item.title: Congressional Stock Trading: How to Track What Congress Buys
item.description: Members of Congress are required by law to disclose their stock trades, and the data shows they consistently outperform the market. Here's how the STOCK Act works, what the data reveals, and how to track politician trades on Aura Alpha.
item.author: shawn@auraalpha.cc (Shawn Gallup)

item.title: The Complete Guide to Trading Bot Risk Management
item.description: Returns get the headlines, but risk management determines whether your trading bot survives. This guide covers kill switches, drawdown limits, position sizing, correlation risk, and regime detection — the essential safety systems every automated trader needs.
item.author: shawn@auraalpha.cc (Shawn Gallup)

item.title: What is Algorithmic Trading? A Beginner's Guide
item.description: Algorithmic trading uses computer programs to execute trades based on predefined rules. Learn the fundamentals, how it works, and why it's transforming how retail and institutional investors approach the markets in 2026.
item.author: noreply@auraalpha.cc (Aura Alpha Team)

item.title: How Aura Alpha's ML Regime Detection Beats the Market
item.description: Markets shift between bull runs, bear crashes, sideways chop, and crisis events. Learn how Aura Alpha's machine learning regime detection system identifies these shifts in real-time and automatically adjusts strategy allocation.
item.author: noreply@auraalpha.cc (Aura Alpha Team)

item.title: Paper Trading vs Live Trading: When to Make the Switch
item.description: Paper trading is essential for strategy validation, but staying in simulation mode forever means missing real opportunities. Here's a framework for knowing when you're ready to go live — and how to manage the transition.
item.author: noreply@auraalpha.cc (Aura Alpha Team)

item.title: The 5 Best Trading Strategies for 2026
item.description: From momentum breakouts to ML-driven regime allocation, these are the five trading strategy categories delivering the strongest risk-adjusted returns in 2026's market environment.
item.author: noreply@auraalpha.cc (Aura Alpha Team)

item.title: Why Multi-Region Diversification Matters for Your Portfolio
item.description: Most traders only trade US stocks. By expanding across 14 global regions, you reduce concentration risk, capture unique opportunities, and build a more resilient portfolio. Here's the data and the playbook.
item.author: noreply@auraalpha.cc (Aura Alpha Team)
